title: Skylands over the Sea
description: Datapack that creates sky island worlds floating over an endless ocean.
body:
# Skylands over the Seas  
This is a datapack that changes the overworld generation to be floating islands, with a twist! All of the ocean biomes are generated below you. All caves and underground biomes are generated under the ocean. 

# IMPORTANT:
Versions below 3.0.0 of the datapack/mod alter the dimension height. This was added at first to add more breathing room for building on the islands, but I have since removed it in 3.0.0+, as this _**will**_ corrupt worlds when the mod is removed. 3.0.0 does not have this issue. If you are migrating a 2.X.X pack to 1.21.9+, please use version 2.0.4, but note that it will _**not**_ be supported for future versions. I apologize for any inconvenience.

## Also checkout
- [Angel Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/angel-islands) a mod that changes the normal overworld to include Aetherial Islands when in deep ocean biomes!
- [Aetherial Islands: Clusters Edit](https://modrinth.com/datapack/aetherial-islands-clusters-edit) an add-on that creates zones where islands will and won't generate, creating large gaps between island clusters (works for Skylands over the Seas as well!).
- [Diabolical Islands](https://modrinth.com/datapack/diabolical-islands) a mod that brings the Aetherial Island generation to the Nether!


## Compatibility: Does this work with <u>*insert mod name here*</u>?
If that mod changes the terrain, one of the mods will probably overwrite the other. If that mod adds biomes, it should be compatible, but if you have issues with bodies of water not generating, use the optional dependency, [Lithostitched](https://modrinth.com/mod/lithostitched). This is just because of the tricky technique I had to use to make this, along with Minecraft's weirdness with surface builders. Some issues may need specific compatibility packs made, which I may make in the future.
